title.ko: 사진제판법에 의한 요철화 또는 패턴화 표면의 제조, 예. 인쇄용, 반도체장치의 제조법용; 그것을 위한 재료; 그것을 위한 원료; 그것을 위한 특별히 적합한 장치 (사진식자기 B41B, 사진용 감광재료 또는 처리는 G03C, 엘렉트로그라피, 그것을 위한 감광층 또는 처리는 G03G)
title.en: PHOTOMECHANICAL PRODUCTION OF TEXTURED OR PATTERNED SURFACES, e.g. FOR PRINTING, FOR PROCESSING OF SEMICONDUCTOR DEVICES; MATERIALS THEREFOR; ORIGINALS THEREFOR; APPARATUS SPECIALLY ADAPTED THEREFOR (phototypographic composing devices B41B;photosensitive materials or processes for photographic purposes G03C;electrography, sensitive layers or processes G03G)

definition.ko: 이 서브클래스에서는 아래의 용어는 이하에 표시한 의미로 사용된다. - "감광성"은 전자파에 대한 감광성 뿐만 아니라 입자선에 대한 감광성도 의미한다. - “감광성 조성”은 감광성 성분을 포함한다, 예. 퀴논디아지드, 적용가능하다면 바인더나 첨가제 - “감광성 물질”은 감광성 조성을 포함한다, 예. 포토레지스트, 그것을 기초로 한것, 적용가능하다면 보조층

title.ko: 질감이 있거나 무늬가 있는 표면의 사진제판법 제품을 위한 원화, 예. 마스크, 포토-마스크 또는 레티클(reticle); 마스크 블랭크(mask blank) 또는 그 투과필름(pellicle); 그를 위해 특히 적용된 용기; 그 준비과정
title.en: Originals for photomechanical production of textured or patterned surfaces, e.g. masks, photo-masks or reticles; Mask blanks or pellicles therefor; Containers specially adapted therefor; Preparation thereof

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서는, 상반되는 지시가 없는 한, 최초개소 우선규칙이 적용되며, 즉. 각 계층적 레벨에서, 최초의 적절한 개소에 분류한다.

title.en: Masks or mask blanks for imaging by charged particle beam [CPB] radiation, e.g. by electron beam; Preparation thereof
Masks or mask blanks for imaging by radiation of 100 nm or shorter wavelength, e.g. X-ray masks, extreme ultraviolet [EUV] masks; Preparation thereof
Reflection masks; Preparation thereof
Phase shift masks [PSM]; PSM blanks; Preparation thereof
with three or more diverse phases on the same PSM; Preparation thereof
Rim PSM or outrigger PSM; Preparation thereof
Alternating PSM, e.g. Levenson-Shibuya PSM; Preparation thereof
Attenuating PSM [att-PSM], e.g. halftone PSM or PSM having semi-transparent phase shift portion; Preparation thereof
Phase-edge PSM, e.g. chromeless PSM; Preparation thereof
Masks having proximity correction features; Preparation thereof, e.g. optical proximity correction [OPC] design processes
Masks having auxiliary features, e.g. special coatings or marks for alignment or testing; Preparation thereof
Electrostatic discharge [ESD] related features, e.g. antistatic coatings or a conductive metal layer around the periphery of the mask substrate
Alignment or registration features, e.g. alignment marks on the mask substrates
Testing or measuring features, e.g. grid patterns, focus monitors, sawtooth scales or notched scales
Antireflective coatings
Protective coatings

title.ko: G03F1/20 ~ G03F1/26의 그룹에 포함되지 않는 마스크 블랭크; 그 준비과정
title.en: Mask blanks not covered by groups G03F0001200000-G03F0001260000; Preparation thereof
Reflectors
Absorbers, e.g. opaque materials
Organic absorbers, e.g. photo-resists
having two or more different absorber layers, e.g. stacked multilayer absorbers
Substrates
Pellicles or pellicle assemblies, e.g. having membrane on support frame; Preparation thereof
characterised by the frames, e.g. structure or material thereof
Containers specially adapted for masks, mask blanks or pellicles; Preparation thereof

title.ko: G03F 1/20 ~ G03F 1/50에 포함되지 않는 준비과정 절차
title.en: Preparation processes not covered by groups G03F0001200000-G03F0001500000
Adapting basic layout or design of masks to lithographic process requirements, e.g. second iteration correction of mask patterns for imaging
Repair or correction of mask defects
by charged particle beam [CPB], e.g. focused ion beam
Patterning of masks by imaging
by charged particle beam [CPB], e.g. electron beam
Etching
Auxiliary processes, e.g. cleaning
Inspecting
by charged particle beam [CPB]
prepared by photographic processes for producing originals simulating relief
prepared by montage processes
prepared from printing surfaces

title.ko: 색분해; 색조의 수정(사진적 복사장치 일반 G03B)
title.en: Colour separation; Correction of tonal value (photographic copying apparatus in general G03B)
by retouching
by photographic means
by masking
by photoelectric means
Checking the colour or tonal value of separation negatives or positives

title.ko: 스크린법; 그것을 위한 스크린
title.en: Screening processes; Screens therefor

title.ko: 투영방법에 의한 것(카메라 G03B)
title.en: by projecting methods (cameras G03B)
changing the screen effect
changing the diaphragm effect
using line screens
using cross-line screens
using other screens, e.g. granulated screen
by contact methods
using grey half-tone screens
using colour half-tone screens
using screens for gravure printing
combining several screens; Elimination of moire
by multiple exposure, e.g. combined processes for line photo and screen

title.ko: 광기계식, 예. 사진석판법 방식에 의해 요철화 또는 패턴화된 표면의 생산, 예. 인쇄 표면; 그것을 위한 재료, 예. 포토레지스트를 포함하는 재료; 그것을 위해 특히 적합한 장치 (포토레지스트 구조를 특후한 제조 공정에 사용하는 경우에는 관련 기술분야를 참조, 예. B44C, H10P76/00, H05K)
title.en: Photomechanical, e.g. photolithographic, production of textured or patterned surfaces, e.g. printed surfaces; Materials therefor, e.g. comprising photoresists; Apparatus specially adapted therefor   (using photoresist structures for special production processes, see the relevant places, e.g. B44C, H10P0076000000, H05K)

title.ko: 감광재료(G03F7/12, G03F7/14 가 우선)
title.en: Photosensitive materials (G03F0007120000, G03F0007140000 take precedence)

title.ko: 아지드(G03F7/075 가 우선)
title.en: Azides (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)
Macromolecular azides; Macromolecular additives, e.g. binders

title.ko: 디아조늄염 또는 화합물(7/075가 우선)
title.en: Diazonium salts or compounds (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)
Macromolecular diazonium compounds; Macromolecular additives, e.g. binders

title.ko: 퀴논디아지드(7/075가 우선)
title.en: Quinonediazides (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)
Macromolecular quinonediazides; Macromolecular additives, e.g. binders

title.ko: 탄소-탄소 3중결합을 갖는 비고분자 광중합성 화합물, 예 아세틸렌형 화합물(7/075가 우선)
title.en: Non-macromolecular photopolymerisable compounds having carbon-to-carbon triple bonds, e.g. acetylenic compounds (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 탄소-탄소 2중결합을 갖는 비고분자 광중합성 화합물, 예. 에틸렌형 화합물(7/075 우선)
title.en: Non-macromolecular photopolymerisable compounds having carbon-to-carbon double bonds, e.g. ethylenic compounds (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 증감물질을 갖는 것, 예. 광중합개시제
title.en: with photosensitivity-increasing substances, e.g. photoinitiators
Inorganic compounds; Onium compounds; Organic compounds having hetero atoms other than oxygen, nitrogen or sulfur

title.ko: 그룹 G03F7/029에 포함되지 않는 유기화합물
title.en: Organic compounds not covered by group G03F0007029000
with binders
the binders being polymers obtained by reactions only involving carbon-to-carbon unsaturated bonds, e.g. vinyl polymers
the binders being polyurethanes
the binders being polyamides or polyimides

title.ko: 불용성 또는 특이적으로 친수성으로 된 고분자화합물 (G03F7/075가 우선; 고분자 아미드 G03F7/012; 고분자 디아조늄 화합물은 G03F7/021)
title.en: Macromolecular compounds which are rendered insoluble or differentially wettable (G03F0007075000 takes precedence;macromolecular azides G03F0007012000;macromolecular diazonium compounds G03F0007021000)

title.ko: 광축퇴 가능한 고분자화합물 예. 양화형 전자 레지스트(47/075 우선; 고분자 퀴논디아지드 7/023)
title.en: Macromolecular compounds which are photodegradable, e.g. positive electron resists (G03F0007075000 takes precedence;macromolecular quinonediazides G03F0007023000)

title.ko: 크롬산염(7/075가 우선)
title.en: Chromates (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 은염(7/075가 우선)
title.en: Silver salts (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)
used for diffusion transfer
Silicon-containing compounds

title.ko: 접착촉진 비고분자첨가제에 특징이 있는 감광조성물 (7/075가 우선)
title.en: Photosensitive compositions characterised by adhesion-promoting non-macromolecular additives (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 구조적 세부, 예 지지체, 보조층, 에 특징이 있는 것 (인쇄판용 지지체 일반 B41N)
title.en: characterised by structural details, e.g. supports, auxiliary layers (supports for printing plates in general B41N)

title.ko: 2개 이상의 감광층을 갖는 것 (G03F7/075가 우선)
title.en: having more than one photosensitive layer (G03F0007075000 takes precedence)
having substances, e.g. indicators, for forming visible images
having cover layers or intermediate layers, e.g. subbing layers
having supports or layers with means for obtaining a screen effect or for obtaining better contact in vacuum printing
Production of screen printing forms or similar printing forms, e.g. stencils
Production of collotype printing forms

title.ko: 도포법; 그것을 위한 장치(지지체 재료에 도포 일반은 B05; 사진목적용 지지체에 감광 조성물의 도포는 G03C 1/74)
title.en: Coating processes; Apparatus therefor (applying coatings to base materials in general B05;applying photosensitive compositions to the base for photographic purposes G03C0001740000)
Coating curved surfaces

title.ko: 노광; 그것을 위한 장치 (복제용 사진인화장치는 G03B 27/00)
title.en: Exposure; Apparatus therefor (photographic printing apparatus for making copies G03B0027000000)

title.ko: 초점 조절수단, 예 자동초점 조절수단 (위치 맞춤과 초점조절과의 조합 G03F9/02; 초점조절신호의 자동발생을 위한 시스템 일반 G02B7/28; 투영인화장치의 자동초점 조절수단 G03B27/34)
title.en: Means for focusing, e.g. automatically (combination of positioning and focusing G03F0009020000;systems for automatic generation of focusing signals in general G02B0007280000;means for automatic focusing of projection printing apparatus G03B0027340000)

title.ko: 표면의 다른 위치를 동일패턴으로 동시에 노광하는 것(7/027 우선)
title.en: Exposing with the same light pattern different positions of the same surface at the same time (G03F0007207000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 표면의 다른 위치를 동일패턴으로 수차 노광하는 것 (G03F7/207 우선)
title.en: Exposing sequentially with the same light pattern different positions of the same surface (G03F0007207000 takes precedence)
Automatic means therefor
Curved surfaces

title.ko: 감광재료의 처리; 그것을 위한 장치 (G03F7/12 ～ G03F7/24가 우선)
title.en: Processing photosensitive materials; Apparatus therefor (G03F0007120000-G03F0007240000 take precedence)

title.ko: 분말 화상을 얻기 위한 것 (G03F3/10이 우선)
title.en: for obtaining powder images (G03F0003100000 takes precedence)
Imagewise removal using liquid means
Liquid compositions therefor, e.g. developers
Imagewise removal by selective transfer, e.g. peeling away

title.ko: 그룹 G03F7/30 ～ G03F7/34에 포함되지 않는 화상제거, 예. 가스유를 사용하는 것, 플라즈마를 사용하는 것
title.en: Imagewise removal not covered by groups G03F0007300000-G03F0007340000, e.g. using gas streams, using plasma
Treatment before imagewise removal, e.g. prebaking
Treatment after imagewise removal, e.g. baking
Stripping or agents therefor

title.ko: 원고, 마스크, 프레임, 사진시트, 표면구조 또는 모양이 작성된 표면의 위치결정 또는 위치 맞춤, 예. 자동적인 것 (G03F7/22 가 우선; 사진마스크의 제조 G03F1/00; 복제용 사진인화장치 G03B27/00)
title.en: Registration or positioning of originals, masks, frames, photographic sheets or textured or patterned surfaces, e.g. automatically (G03F0007220000 takes precedence;preparation of photographic masks G03F0001000000;within photographic printing apparatus for making copies G03B0027000000)

title.ko: 자동초점조절의 수단과 조합시킨 것 (자동초점조절 일반 G02B7/09, 초점조절 신호의 자동발생을 위한 시스템 G02B7/28)
title.en: combined with means for automatic focusing (automatic focusing in general G02B0007090000;systems for automatic generation of focusing signals G02B0007280000)
